title: elaphoglossum drabifolium
intro: Elaphoglossum drabifolium, also known as the small-leaved elaphoglossum, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is valued for its ability to soothe and calm the respiratory system, reducing inflammation and congestion, and promoting easy breathing. Elaphoglossum drabifolium is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, with the dried leaves being steeped in hot water to release its medicinal compounds.
